🏆 High-Elo Ace Winner Playbook v8

PRESCRIPTIVE Each turn now reads as "what to do, what to expect, when to counter" — not raw distributions. Numbers are from verified replays + math you can apply.
Sample: 18,075 OP15-era ranked replays scanned (2026-W12+, mode 0). Kept 1573 games where Ace WON and Ace player's Elo ≥ 2400.
1573verified Ace wins
18,075replays scanned
2400+Elo
8matchups
🟣 Enel (388)🌊 Nami (255)🔥 Mirror (151)💢 Lucy (124)☀️ Yellow Luffy MD (90)⚔️ Mihawk (46)👊 Luffy G/R (57)🌟 Yellow Luffy (45)

🟣 vs Enel OP15-058

5L · Purple · opp leader 5000p
Ramps DON via leader rest-to-attach. The threat tree: Ohm/Shura/Satori chip → Senor Pink → Enel 8c (OP15-118) is the wincon. You race the 8c lockout.
388 wins analyzed
⬅ Going 1st (197 wins)
T1
1 DONLife 3 (100%)197 wins
🎯 OPTIONS
Monkey.D.Garp1D31% (62/197) / Izo1D24% (48/197) / Otama1D16% (32/197)

no attacks typical

5 DONLife 2 (56%)▼ took damage196 wins

🌊 vs Nami OP11-041

4L · Blue/Yellow · opp leader 5000p
Draws when either player loses life and her hand ≤7. Banish disables the draw. Her win = Robin/Perona swarm late.
